prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CRYSTALLOGRAPHIC REFINEMENT AT 2.3 ANGSTROMS RESOLUTION AND REFINED MODEL OF THE PHOTOSYNTHETIC REACTION CENTER FROM RHODOPSEUDOMONAS VIRIDIS. Entity description: PHOTOSYNTHETIC REACTION CENTER. Organism: Blastochloris viridis. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V74 E68 metadata context marks: assembly_context membrane_context_strong metal_cluster_geometry oligomer_context partner_copy_context topology_evidence transmembrane_context. Known E68 words are allowed; candidate E69 labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.

v74_context_policy.context_derivation: V74 E68 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. E68-known words are allowed; candidate E69 words are withheld from prediction text so V74 can discover them.
